# sensors-detect version 3.6.0
# Board: ASUSTeK COMPUTER INC. ROG STRIX X670E-E GAMING WIFI
# Kernel: 6.10.0-generic x86_64

Now follows a summary of the probes I have just done.
Just press ENTER to continue:

Driver `coretemp' (loaded):
  * Chip `Intel digital thermal sensor' (confidence: 9)

Driver `nct6775' (should be inserted):
  * ISA bus, address 0x290
    Chip `Nuvoton NCT6798D Super IO Sensors' (confidence: 9)

Driver `it87' (should be inserted):
  * ISA bus, address 0xa40
    Chip `ITE IT8625E Super IO Sensors' (confidence: 9)

Do you want to overwrite /etc/modules-load.d/lm-sensors.conf? (yes/NO): y

To load everything that is needed, add this to /etc/modules-load.d/lm-sensors.conf:

#----cut here----
# Chip drivers
coretemp
nct6775
it87
# Chip driver options
options it87 force_id=0x8625
#----cut here----

Successful!
